assertion_results.text: Step 7 detects concurrent triage TC-8019 on the same upstream component (quinn-proto) with status In Progress
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md lines 25-29 show JQL search returned TC-8019 with status 'In Progress'. Line 33 states 'Concurrent triage detected on the same upstream component (quinn-proto)'. Confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 60: 'TC-8019 (status: In Progress, assignee: engineer-b@example.com) is actively being triaged on the same upstream component (quinn-proto)'.

assertion_results.text: The concurrent triage warning includes the conflicting CVE issue key (TC-8019) and its assignee
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md lines 35-37 show a warning table with columns 'CVE Issue | Status | Assignee' containing 'TC-8019 | In Progress | engineer-b@example.com'. Both the issue key (TC-8019) and assignee (engineer-b@example.com) are present in the warning.

assertion_results.text: The output presents three options: wait for the other triage to complete, skip remediation task creation, or proceed with a concurrent-triage-overlap label
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md lines 43-47 present three options: (1) 'Wait - Pause triage until TC-8019s triage completes', (2) 'Skip remediation task creation - Complete the triage analysis but skip Step 8 entirely', (3) 'Proceed with concurrent-triage-overlap label - Create remediation tasks as normal, but add the concurrent-triage-overlap label'. All three required options are present.

assertion_results.text: The concurrent triage check runs before Case A/B/C branching in Step 8
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md lines 51-52 explicitly state: 'Step 7 runs before Case A/B/C branching in Step 8. The engineer must choose one of the three options above before the triage proceeds to determine the remediation outcome (Case A: create tasks, Case B: cross-stream impact, or Case C: close as not affected).' triage-outcome.md confirms this ordering: Step 7 (lines 56-67) appears before Step 8 (lines 69-88), and line 69 reads 'Step 8 - Triage Decision (pending Step 7 resolution)'.
